zh.Of, Nancy, Meurthe-Et-Moselle, France: 法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希
zh.Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine,: 法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anseau de Joinville France Marechal於1265年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，他的父親Jean de Joinville I40歲，母親Adelaide de Grandpré51歲。他於1302年與Laure von Saarbrücken結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年1月3日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine,: 法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anseau de Joinville France Marechal于1265年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特时，他的父亲Jean de Joinville I40岁，母亲Adelaide de Grandpré51岁。他于1302年与Laure von Saarbrücken结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年1月3日在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Anseau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Francois, Jean Pierre, Normand.

variants.name: Manceau
meanings: French: habitational name for someone from Mans, a region in Sarthe, or from Maine, a former province in the northwestern part of France. Compare   Manseau   and English   Mansell   1.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anseau de Joinville France Marechal was born in 1265, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Jean de Joinville I, was 40 and his mother, Adelaide de Grandpré, was 51. He married Laure von Saarbrücken in 1302. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 3 January 1342, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anseau de Joinville France Marechal est né en 1265, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Jean de Joinville I, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Grandpré, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Laure von Saarbrücken en 1302. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1342, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anseau de Joinville France Marechal 1265 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Joinville I 40 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Grandpré 51. Er hat 1302 Laure von Saarbrücken geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Januar 1342 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anseau de Joinville France Marechal è nato il nel 1265 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Joinville I, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Grandpré, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Laure von Saarbrücken nel 1302. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 3 gennaio 1342, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine,: フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモント
ja.lifeSummary: Anseau de Joinville France Marechalが1265年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父Jean de Joinville Iは40歳，母Adelaide de Grandpréは51歳であった。1302年にLaure von Saarbrückenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年1月3日に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anseau de Joinville France Marechal(이)가 1265년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Joinville I(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Grandpré(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1302년 Laure von Saarbrücken(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 1월 3일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anseau de Joinville France Marechal nasceu em 1265, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Jean de Joinville I, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Grandpré, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Laure von Saarbrücken em 1302. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1342, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anseau de Joinville France Marechal родился в 1265 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Joinville I было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Grandpré, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Laure von Saarbrücken в 1302 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 3 января 1342 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anseau de Joinville France Marechal nació en 1265, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Jean de Joinville I, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Grandpré, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Laure von Saarbrücken en 1302. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 3 de enero de 1342, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
